name: code-reviewer
description: Read-only code reviewer — EXAMPLE subagent seeded by the agent-scaffold skill to demonstrate the .agents/subagents/ → .claude+.codex projection. Audits a change set for correctness, security, and convention adherence and reports findings without editing. Replace with project-specific reviewers or delete this stub (then re-run `python tools/agent/generate-subagents.py`). Dispatch before merging a change back to trunk.
